stemHtml: You received the following instruction from ATC: “SUN AIR 764, RESET SQUAWK MODE Charlie 5503”. What is your correct action and reply?

options.a: You reset code 5503, ensure pressure altitude is selected and reply “resetting squawk 5503 mode Charlie”
options.c: You reset code 5503, ensure pressure altitude is selected and reply: “resetting mode Charlie 5503, Sun Air 764”
